## Description
Provide a brief summary of the changes introduced in this Pull Request.

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🚀 New Feature
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix
- [ ] ⚡ Performance Enhancement
- [ ] 🔒 Security Patch
- [ ] 📝 Documentation / Code Style Update

## 📝 Draft Release Notes
Write 2-3 bullet points detailing the user-facing changes for this release.
- **Added**: [Describe new features]
- **Changed**: [Describe updates to existing features]
- **Fixed**: [Describe bug fixes]

---

## 🛡️ Production Readiness Checklist
Ensure these checks are completed before request approval:

### 1. Verification & Tests
- [ ] Static analysis / Lint check passed (`flutter analyze` or lint command)
- [ ] Automated unit/widget/integration tests passed successfully
- [ ] Manual verification completed on target environments (Android emulator, iOS simulator, web browser, etc.)

### 2. Regression & Safety
- [ ] No breaking changes introduced to existing user paths (e.g. Tenant flows)
- [ ] Edge cases (empty data, loading states, offline modes) handled gracefully

### 3. Security Hardening
- [ ] Security scan run on modified code (vulnerability scans, dependency checks)
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or passwords hardcoded
- [ ] Correct authorization guards and role checks implemented
